title: Smart Switch for Wide-Bandgap Devices
description:
• Next-Gen smart switch.
• Heterogeneous integration.
• Thermal management and multi-physics analysis.
• Device reliability and aging detection.
• Advanced packaging.

title: Multi-physics Sensing and Predictive Control
description:
• Advanced sensing circuits for multi-phase current balancing.
• Integrated SenseFET and DCR sensing methodologies.
• Control algorithms for predictable operation.
• Temp-coefficient correction and on-chip LC design.

title: AI-Assisted Power Applications
description:
• Deploy AI agents for dynamical control.
• Develop NN-based transient tuning.
• Advanced optimization algorithms for power application.

title: Emerging Novel Applications
description:
• Optical communication.
• Deep-space illumination.
• Humanoid robots.
• Wide temp range applications.
